news.title: Genuway Expands Automotive Crystal Portfolio with New AEC-Q200 Products
news.summary: Genuway announces new AEC-Q200 qualified crystal oscillators and resonators for automotive applications, featuring extended temperature range and enhanced reliability.
content: Genuway Technology has announced the expansion of its automotive crystal portfolio with new AEC-Q200 qualified products designed for demanding automotive applications.
The new automotive products include:
- Extended temperature range -40°C to +150°C
- Enhanced mechanical shock and vibration resistance
- Improved aging characteristics
- Full PPAP documentation support
- Long-term supply commitment
These products are ideal for ADAS, infotainment, powertrain control, and battery management systems in electric vehicles.
BeiLuo Electronics, as a core distributor, will have these new automotive products available for sampling and production orders.

news.title: Genuway Introduces Ultra-Low Jitter Oscillators for 6G Communications
news.summary: Genuway launches new differential oscillators with ultra-low phase noise for next-generation 6G communications infrastructure.
content: Genuway Technology has introduced a new series of ultra-low jitter differential oscillators optimized for 6G communications applications.
Key features include:
- Phase noise better than -160dBc/Hz at 1MHz offset
- RMS jitter less than 100 femtoseconds
- Frequency range up to 3GHz
- LVDS, LVPECL, and HCSL output options
- 2.5V and 3.3V supply voltage options
These oscillators meet the stringent timing requirements of next-generation communications systems.
Contact BeiLuo Electronics for samples and technical support.

news.title: BeiLuo Electronics Strengthens Partnership with Genuway Technology
news.summary: BeiLuo Electronics expands Genuway product inventory and technical support to better serve customers in communications and automotive markets.
content: BeiLuo Electronics is pleased to announce the expansion of our partnership with Genuway Technology.
Key enhancements include:
- Expanded inventory of popular crystal oscillators
- Increased stock of automotive-grade crystals
- Dedicated FAE team with specialized training
- New evaluation boards and reference designs
- Enhanced local technical support
These investments enable BeiLuo to provide faster delivery and better technical support for Genuway products.
